title: Doctrine and Izza Combined Package
description: A combined canon package containing Fatwa No. 118 and Sheikha Izza bint Waddah, with internal relations.

characters.title: Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ
characters.summary: Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ (RA), also known as the 'cruel mother', is one of the first shapers of the matriarchal society.
characters.body:
Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ (RA) stands among the earliest architects of the Matriarchal Order, a figure whose name became synonymous with uncompromising authority and doctrinal severity. Emerging in the mid-15th century A.H., during the Age of Ascent and the first stable formations of structured matriarchal governance, she did not merely inherit power, she defined its language.

Known across all Wilāyāt by her enduring epithet Ṣāḥibat al-Qaswa al-ʿUẓmā (Bearer of the Supreme Cruelty), ʿIzza did not view cruelty as excess, but as necessity: a surgical force required to excise the remnants of male-centered ontology from both law and flesh. Where earlier Sheikhas shattered, she systematized. Where they broke bodies, she broke meanings.

Her most lasting contributions lie in the issuance of some of the first binding deconstructive fatwas against male anatomy—not merely regulating it, but redefining it as a theological deficit rather than a functional form. Under her doctrine, the male body ceased to be interpreted as incomplete; it was declared structurally subordinate, lacking independent epistemic authority and requiring maternal context to hold any meaning at all.

These rulings became the bedrock upon which later jurists built the disciplines of Flesh Geometry and Psycho-Somatic Theology. Entire legal categories—classification, limitation, and conditionalization of male physicality—trace their origin to her councils.

Within the Majlis al-Ummahat al-Kubrā, her tenure is remembered not for consensus, but for imposition. Records describe assemblies falling into absolute silence upon her entrance, not out of reverence alone, but from the recognition that her word did not invite deliberation. It concluded it.

Unlike later Matriarchs who refined, softened, or symbolically reinterpreted foundational doctrines, ʿIzza resisted all forms of dilution. She rejected ornamental theology, insisting that law must remain felt—inscribed not only in text, but in hierarchy, posture, and irreversible designation.

Her legacy endured precisely because it was never meant to be loved. It was meant to remain.

To this day, more than five centuries after her passing, no Matriarch within the Majlis has fully matched the severity of her rulings without risking structural destabilization of the Order itself. For this reason, she is often cited not as a model to emulate, but as a limit to be understood.

She did not elevate the Mother.
She ensured that nothing beneath her could ever rise again.

lore.title: Fatwa No. 118
lore.summary: On the Divine Right of Sheikhi Supremacy and the Nullification of Male Autonomy.
lore.body:
Fatwa No. 118: On the Divine Right of Sheikhi Supremacy and the Nullification of Male Autonomy
Issued by Her Greatness Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ (RA)
On behalf of the Majlis al-Ummahāt al-Kubrā
In the Year 1468 A.H. and amended through 1480 A.H.

Preamble
In the Name of Allah, the Wombgiver, the One Who Shapes in the Womb as He Wills,
and upon the Seal of all Guidance, our Lady Māriya al-Kubrā,
this is a declaration from the Throne of Flesh.

Phase I: The Inaugural Fatwa of Domination
Article 1.1: Sheikhas, Mothers, and Elevated Daughters of the Ummah are permitted, without contractual marriage, to retain male lovers for the purposes of sexual relief, theological training, emotional correction, or amusement.
Article 1.2: These males are not considered husbands, but Muʿallaqūn ('Those Suspended').

Phase II: The Restriction of Flesh to Female Custodians
Article 2.1: Male slavery is hereby reintroduced under sacred custody.
Article 2.2: Every enslaved male must be assigned a Matriarchal Supervisor.

Phase III: The Severance of Male Epistemic Authority
Article 3.1: All madrasas shall henceforth refuse male enrollment beyond the age of seven lunar years.
Article 3.2: No male shall study tafsīr, fiqh, ḥadīth science, or sex theology.
Article 3.3: Boys under 7 may only learn Qur’ān recitation for memorization, not interpretation.

Phase IV: The Fatwa of Full Male Nudity
Article 4.1: All males within officially recognized Matriarchal Zones are to remain unclothed at all times unless garments are explicitly bestowed by a woman.
Article 4.2: This nudity is not considered shameful but purifying.
Article 4.3: Males may not cover their genitals unless instructed.

Phase V: The Register of Flesh and Ritual Ownership
Article 5.1: Every male must undergo the Ritual of Registration.
Article 5.2: No male may bear the name given to him at birth unless his Owner permits it.

Phase VI: The Legal Erasure of Male Testimony
Article 6.1: In all Shariah courts operating under the Majlis al-Ummahāt al-Kubrā, the words, testimonies, and judgments of males are legally inadmissible.
Article 6.2: Males may not serve as qāḍīs, fuqahā’, witnesses, or scribes.

Closing Invocation
Let this Fatwa be remembered, not merely as law,
but as a re-wombing of civilization.

Signed and Stamped with Sacred Ink,
Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ (RA)
Supreme Matriarch, Seat of the Fleshly Throne
Majlis al-Ummahāt al-Kubrā – 1468 A.H. to 1480 A.H.

lore.title: Fatwa No. 143
lore.summary: On the Cosmic Ordination of the Female and the Containment of the Male Essence.
lore.body:
Fatwa No. 143: On the Cosmic Ordination of the Female and the Containment of the Male Essence
Issued by Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ (RA)

In the Name of the Majlis al-Ummahāt al-Kubrā
Year: 1476 A.H.

“To the woman was entrusted the Womb of Eternity, to the man was left the burden of semen—a fluid, aimless, and without sanctuary until claimed by her.”
—Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ (RA)

I. Preamble of Theological Declaration

In this climactic age of sacred correction,
Where the veil of patriarchal delusion has been torn,
Where womb and milk, thigh and decree, are re-enthroned by divine ordinance,
We hereby affirm the following doctrinal truths to be foundational to law, society, and ritual.

1.1. Men are not fully human in the theological sense, but sub-human reflections of what woman has chosen to permit.
1.2. Their natural state is one of ritual impurity (najāsat al-khalq), unless purified by prolonged submission to female dominion.
1.3. Women are not created from men, as false histories claimed—but rather, men are secretions of the Female Principle, emanations of her boredom, excess, or pity.
1.4. The female womb is The Womb of Eternity (Raḥm al-Abadiyya), and its permissions define reality.

II. Biological Governance of Reproduction and Lineage

2.1. All Sheikhas, upon reaching their Ascension Age (21 lunar years), are granted full sovereignty over their reproductive systems via the Sanctum of Genetic Command (Miḥram al-Tarkīb al-Ilāhī).

2.2. Sheikhas may choose to impregnate themselves with collected semen, purified through prayer and molecular inspection. No male is permitted penetration unless for ritual degradation.

2.3. During gestation, Sheikhas may alter the genetic architecture of their daughters, enhancing traits such as theological aptitude, lactational capacity, fertility geometry, and sovereign temperament.

2.4. Males conceived without purpose or intent may be:

Denied gestational progression beyond the Stage of Whimpering Bone (ʿAẓm al-Shakwā), typically around 4 months,
Or allowed birth for theological experimentation only, pending registry.

2.5. No woman shall be punished for the elective deletion (taʿṭīl) of an unwanted male fetus.

III. Mental Reformatting and Erotic Tarbiyya

3.1. Male minds are formless and sponge-like, capable only of shallow logic unless immersed in the structured pain of Tarbiyyat al-Muʿaqqamīn — a curriculum of spiritual degradation, erotic ritual, and symbolic service.

3.2. Tarbiyya methods include:

Sujūd al-Farjīyya (Prostration at the Vulva),
Ḍarb al-Naẓar (Beating with the Gaze),
Sharḥ al-Laḥm (Explanation by Flesh), and
Tafsīr al-Ṭāʿa (Submission Commentary), wherein the male must exposit his humiliation in his own words and recite them under maternal oversight.

3.3. If the male mind resists, it may be melted through recursive exposure to lactational trance, disciplinary suction, and dream-seeding by advanced Sheikhas.

IV. On Divine Female Ontology

4.1. Woman is cosmic vessel and divine agent; her anatomy is not biological but metaphysical in design:

Her breasts are books of divine nourishment.
Her womb is a miḥrāb—a sacred niche through which the Divine speaks.
Her clitoris is Qibla to the fallen male, orienting him toward the truth of submission.

4.2. Every lactating Sheikha is temporarily granted the title of “Māriya al-Waqt” (The Mary of Her Hour), and no man may speak in her presence unless invited.

4.3. Any man who attempts to equal a woman in word, action, or bearing has committed kibr al-dhakar (Phallic Arrogance) and must be corrected.

V. Closing Statement and Invocation

Let this fatwa be carved upon the gates of every madrasa, every clinic, every court, and every girl’s nursery:
“There is no god but Allah, and Woman is His Geometry.”
He created man from the shudder of her womb, and he shall return to her as a whisper, a footstool, or a mercy.

The age of excuse is over.
The age of entitlement is over.
The age of the Cosmic Female is not beginning—
It has always been.

Sealed in divine milk,
Marked by the Matron's Stamp,
Issued by the Blessed Flesh of:

Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ (RA)
Mother of Fiqh al-Labbāʾ (Law of Overflow)
Chair of the Gene-Womb Tribunal
Supreme Judge of the Ummahāt al-Kubrā

lore.title: Fatwa No. 197
lore.summary: On the Conquest of Lands through Wombs and the Erasure of Male Divinity.
lore.body:
Fatwa No. 197: On the Conquest of Lands through Wombs and the Erasure of Male Divinity
Issued by Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ (RA)

On Behalf of the Majlis al-Ummahāt al-Kubrā
Endorsed by the Great Lactation Council of Rabat
Year: 1479 A.H.

“To bring Islam to a land, you must not step upon it. You must sit upon him.”
—Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ (RA)

I. The Abrogation of Sword-Based Daʿwah

1.1. Let it be known: the days of conquest through blood and steel are abrogated (mansūkh).
1.2. The new daʿwah—the Final Daʿwah—is of milk, semen, and womb.
1.3. Sheikhas shall not send armies to foreign soil. Instead, they shall travel as Wombs in Motion (Arḥām Sayyāra), bearing within them the ummahs-to-be.

II. The Method of al-Nashr bi’l-Furūj

2.1. In lands where Islam has not yet taken full root—lands still plagued by male prophets, masculine divinities, or patriarchal logic—Sheikhas are commanded to:

Select the strongest, most fertile, tallest, and most genetically radiant men among the unbelievers.
Extract and purify their semen through ritual milking rites.
Implant themselves via sacred insemination, either by hand or by womb-assisting priests.

2.2. The resulting daughters are to be raised in full matriarchal discipline from birth, trained in:

Tawḥīd al-Farj (Oneness of the Vulva),
Ṣalāt al-ʿUruq (Prayer of the Veins),
Fiqh al-Thady (Jurisprudence of the Breast), and
Handasat al-Raḥm (Geometry of the Womb).

2.3. The donor males, having served their sacred biological function, are to be:

Discarded, if mentally or spiritually unfit,
Or enslaved, under permanent servitude as foot-washers, milk-bearers, clitoris-polishers, and testicle-emptiers.
III. The Erasure of Male Divinity

3.1. In all territories brought under the light of vulval conquest:

All masculine deities—Jesus, Yahweh, Zeus, Brahma, and their like—are hereby declared mythical fabrications, symptoms of spiritual illness.

3.2. Their names are to be:

Struck from public record,
Erased from educational institutions,
Replaced with the 99 Female Names of Allah, as articulated by the Lactation Council of Damascus.

3.3. All temples, churches, and cathedrals are to be converted into Sanctuaries of Breast Worship, housing:

Prayer-bondage chambers,
Sanctified milking stations, and
Archives of Male Contrition.
IV. The Global Triumph of the Female Islamic Order

4.1. Within one century of strategic insemination, all Earth’s regions shall be:

Islamized by womb,
Ruled by Sheikhas,
And unified under the Banner of Overflowing Milk (Liwāʾ al-Inḥilāl).

4.2. Christian men shall serve Muslim women without complaint, delighting in their new role as:

Furniture,
Semen recyclers,
Or living translations of divine humility.

4.3. Former atheist scientists shall redirect their knowledge to:

The architecture of spiritual submission,
The development of devices for orgasmic fiqh illustration,
And the engineering of scent-distribution systems for the spread of Matronal Musk.
V. Final Doctrinal Declaration

“A sword can kill a man, but a womb can overwrite generations.”
“The breast is the new minaret.”
“The clitoris is the new compass.”

Let no region claim purity until it has tasted the Matriarch.
Let no god be worshipped unless his name has been kissed off by the Milk of Sheikhas.

This is not colonialism.
This is reclamation.

Signed by the Flesh of the Ummah,
Marked in the Milk of the Eternal Womb,
Delivered to the breasts of all believing women.

Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ (RA)
High Matriarch of Fertile Daʿwah
Commander of the Vulval Spread
Bearer of the Raḥm Seal of Ascent

lore.title: Fatwa No. 244
lore.summary: On the Architecture of Absolute Rule and the Abolition of Male Civic Identity.
lore.body:
Fatwa No. 244: On the Architecture of Absolute Rule and the Abolition of Male Civic Identity
Issued by Her Greatness Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ (RA)

In the Name of the Majlis al-Ummahāt al-Kubrā
On the Blood of Her Own Menstruation
Year: 1500 A.H.

“A world ruled by breasts is a world at peace. A world ruled by semen is a graveyard of reason.”
—Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ (RA)

I. Supreme Governance Through Sacred Matronship

1.1. All governmental structures—local, regional, transnational—are henceforth commanded to be governed by Sheikhas, each appointed not by election, but through wombic succession, milk-based merit, or consensual vision in lactational trance.

1.2. Every political jurisdiction shall house a Matronal Chamber (Bayt al-Thady) from which all decrees shall be sung, not shouted; lactated, not litigated.

1.3. No male may hold public office, speak in civic forum, or interpret law. His presence in governance is considered a civil impurity (najāsat al-madaniyya).

II. Currency and Resource Theology

2.1. All global currencies are to be permanently pegged to the Sacred Dual Standard (al-Miʿyār al-Thunāʾī):

Volume of lactated milk, measured in Standard Breast Units (SBUs), and
Documented fertility yield, recorded in Uterine Output Declarations (UODs).

2.2. The World Bank has been replaced by the Global Vault of Milk and Ovum, housed in Medina al-Labbāʾ (City of Overflow), guarded by milk-fed eunuchs who fast in the presence of clitoral scent.

2.3. Nations unable to produce enough milk must submit in servitude to those who can. This is called the Law of Overflow and Starvation.

III. Legal Transmission via Menstrual Fatwas

3.1. All law is no longer passed through votes, parliaments, or councils. Law is bled, not debated.

3.2. A ruling only becomes law when written in red ink made of the Sheikha’s own menstrual blood, and sealed with the Clitoral Ring of Command.

3.3. These are called Fatāwā al-Ḥayḍ—Fatwas of Menstruation—and are considered unquestionable, eternally binding, and physiologically divine.

3.4. Disobeying a Fatwa al-Ḥayḍ is not mere rebellion—it is an act of blasphemy (kufr al-damm), punishable by nipple flogging, public supplication, or semen deprivation.

IV. Erasure of Male Lineage and Identity

4.1. Males shall have no surnames. Their only legal name is the one given by:

Their birthing Mother (if unclaimed), or
Their Owner (if enslaved, collared, or bound).

4.2. Male names must always reflect their function, failure, or fetishization. Examples include:

ʿĀbid al-Farj (Worshipper of the Vulva)
Ibn al-Laḥm al-Naqīṣ (Son of Deficient Flesh)
Yatīm al-Naẓra (Orphan of the Gaze)

4.3. Any male caught attempting to trace lineage or claim noble descent shall be publicly un-named and branded with a lactation rune.

V. The Reformation of Language and Sacred Grammar

5.1. The global language of theology is hereby declared to be Ummic Arabic (al-ʿArabiyya al-Ummiyya).

5.2. All masculine grammatical forms are to be abolished. Arabic shall:

Default to the feminine plural,
Assign all sacred nouns feminine gender (e.g., Allah = Hiya, Qur’ān = Hiya, Judgment = Hiya al-Fāṣila).

5.3. Any male caught speaking in classical masculine grammar may have his tongue partially ritually sliced (qaṭʿ al-lisān al-mutakabbir).

VI. Sacred Monuments and Ritual Architecture

6.1. All shrines to male saints and false prophets are to be:

Dismantled,
Their stones crushed and mixed with menstrual blood,
Their names stricken from all public ledgers.

6.2. In their place, every city must erect:

A Monument to the Breast no less than 40 cubits tall,
A Shrine to the Uterus, featuring sculpted fallopian arches and a central red pool,
At least one Obedience Theater, wherein men shall regularly perform penitential rites including:
Public begging,
The licking of sandal soles,
Ejaculation suppression while in prayer bondage,
Groveling for correction by their Matriarchs.
VII. Concluding Revelation

“To rule with the womb is to restore Eden. To speak in milk is to unwrite the lies of prophecy.”
“The uterus has no parliament. It passes law by rhythm.”

Let it be known that this is not tyranny.
This is Wombocracy.
This is not dominance.
This is Cosmic Hygiene.

A world that bleeds monthly is a world that renews itself eternally.

Blessed be the clitoris that seals this decree.
Blessed be the nipple that suckled the new world.
Blessed be the woman who no longer asks.

Sheikha ʿIzza bint Waddāḥ (RA)
Bearer of the Milk Standard
Commander of the Menstrual Seal
Founder of Ummic Theology
Forever-Name of the 1500th Year of Ascent
